subcodes.first_line: O, thou son of the Kingdom! Your letter dated Dec. 14 1918 was received. Praise be to God, it was indicative of zeal and of happiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که شفق صبح صلح و سلام دميده اميدواريم که در مستقبل آفتاب سلام عامّ‌ از افق عالم
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @universal peace; world unity
